item.title: Images of Note: Someone is committing a federal crime right here!
item.description:
Basically me most days
wait mode
:O
basically this is my headcanon now
Outrageous!
fuck i hate arthur
yay
tha i a' tighinn. Chan urrain dhut ruith.
AAAAAAA
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky I'm only posting now so I can sleep in tomorrow.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
isn't that xena? greetings online friends
it's basically a bed of it's own
yeah that's pretty good
yes
called out
i guess
it's a mess in there
the sandwich on the bottom terrifies me
mmm hmm
this aggression will not stand, man
facts
dude.. oversharing
clearly
oh please they aren't that complex
hard no
there goes my sunday plans
i actually know quite a few.. the circled one is peter stormare, he's in fargo and big lebowski and a bunch of others
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: But eggs will be cheaper.
item.description: Good lord people in my country are stupid. They think a Billionaire is gonna give them anything? Lol, it’s like they didn’t even watch Scrooge Mcduck growing up. Let me break this down for you. Trump is there to distract; that’s it. He’s a puppet and while we’re all freaking out about the stupid shit he says…we get screwed by laws that affect us that we don’t even realize. There are probably hundreds of examples of this…please share below. I’ll kick things off and share a video about how we’ve pretty much lost any power to fight corporations in court. Let’s learn about arbitration and how you’ve given away your ability to sue a company even though they’ve obviously stepped over a line or should be held responsible for something. Buckle up buttercup. https://youtu.be/sVe_60Pe3yM?si=3exVrD302Qh8pfEF
item.dc:creator: pixelpatron

item.title: Insurance companies hate this one simple trick
item.description: I do not condone violence. However, I do agree with the implementation of violence when it is appropriate. It was very appropriate in this instance. FP Edit: Thanks for the conversation spurred by this! Want to help a disabled veteran? https://www.gofundme.com/f/Help-crush-ptsd https://linktr.ee/GridSquares Thanks for any considerations
item.dc:creator: VeteranGridSquares

item.title: May 22, 2022.
item.description:
376 cops (three hundred and seventy six cops) responded to the Uvalde massacre. Not a single one did a fucking thing for over an hour. The gunman just got to walk around and fuckin kill people... 9 year old children. Meanwhile...
They'll sure dress pretty for the rich folk. That crooked ass mayor's even in the fuckin picture. See those fancy ass guns that WE BOUGHT THEM? They're champin at the bit to use those to no-knock your front door and put holes in your 16 year old son over some weed.
We're just meat that better pay our taxes to them. They will let even the most vulnerable of us die (that includes you, Mr. Back The Blue) if they're not killing us themselves. FYI: The cops in Uvalde were absolved too. "There was no breach of protocol." *To protect and serve* is just a sticker on their car. They don't give a fuck about you. That's a nice watch you got on though...
item.dc:creator: DemSumBigAssRidges

item.dc:creator: Tiddlywinks247

item.title: Feeding the boys prawns. Percy still can't cat...
item.description: Pierrot continues to amaze me. He could have just taken the prawns, but he showed me he wanted another piece by focussing on the bowl instead. Percy is well... Percy. Chopsticks were used to keep my hands clean while I ate my own dinner with separate cutlery ?
item.dc:creator: xSchnapsx

item.title: My favourite comics of 2024
item.description:
https://loadingartist.com/comic/rose-to-the-occasion/
https://loadingartist.com/comic/endgame/
https://loadingartist.com/comic/moved/ I've made merch of this lil guy (store's on sale til the end of the year!) https://shop.loadingartist.com/collections/ghost-box
https://loadingartist.com/comic/candy-man/ 2024’s almost over, so I thought I’d highlight four of my favourite comics from this year! Did any of these make your list too? Thank you for reading, imgur!
item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: Team cool niche information
item.description: I've seen a lot of posts with pinecone knowledge. Fossil pinecones, pinecone jam, pine-seed growth timelapse... Step it up acorns. Let me know the neato acorn facts.
item.dc:creator: theraininspainfallsmainlyontheplain

item.title: It is what it is.
item.description: Maybe Confession Octopus would have been a better meme, but meh. It's just kind of weird yet nice to feel the heart go pitter patter when they post something or comment. Then again, maybe it's just gas. Or an impending cardiac event. Eh. It's still fun. Whee! Anyway, taking the tiniers to rockafeller tomorrow for ice skating. Good night Imgur.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus
